common.emptyDescription: Adjust the filters or create the first record.

confirmations.activateDescription: The record will be available again for the team.
confirmations.deactivateDescription: The record will stay unavailable until you activate it again.

auth.loginTitle: A barbershop with serious control from day one.
auth.loginDescription: Sign in against the real backend. The JWT is stored in an httpOnly cookie and the dashboard runs as a Server Component.
auth.signupTitle: Create tenant, initial branch and admin in one step.
auth.signupDescription: Signup delegates the whole onboarding flow to the backend and opens the session automatically with the frontend secure cookie.
auth.loginCardDescription: Sign in with email + password. The backend resolves the tenant from the user.
auth.signupCardDescription: This flow creates the tenant, branch, admin and initial access. When it finishes, you land directly in the dashboard.
auth.signupFootnote: Signup calls the real backend and keeps you authenticated without exposing the token in the browser.
auth.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Sign in again.

errors.unauthorized: Your session is no longer valid. Sign in again.
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to perform this action.
errors.branchRequired: Select a branch above to continue.
errors.branchForbidden: You don't have access to the selected branch.
errors.conflict: A record with those values already exists.
errors.validation: Review the data and try again.

ui.searchPlaceholder: Search will arrive with appointments, cash and scheduling
ui.branchHint: Branch-scoped via cookie and internal BFF.
ui.branchUpdateFailed: We couldn't save the selected branch.
ui.workspaceDescription: Additional actions, admin modules and branch switching.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: A clear view of the tenant, the active branch and the operating pulse for {name}.
dashboard.errorTitle: We couldn't load your current context
dashboard.errorFallback: The backend returned an unexpected error while calling /me.
dashboard.branchNoneDescription: Pick a branch above to unlock clients, activity and branch-scoped actions.
dashboard.clientsMetricWithoutBranch: Select a branch to show this metric.
dashboard.tenantDescription: The shell adapts navigation and actions based on your permissions.
dashboard.quickActionsDescription: Shortcuts to start demos, seed data or keep exploring the product.
dashboard.revenueHintDescription: If you activated the visible catalog today, the baseline ticket would start from {amount}.
dashboard.revenueHintEmpty: Create services to show a ticket baseline and start telling a commercial story.
dashboard.recentClientsDescription: A quick read of the selected branch without opening the full module.
dashboard.recentClientsNoBranchTitle: Select a branch to see activity
dashboard.recentClientsNoBranchDescription: Clients live per branch. As soon as you choose one above, you'll see the latest records here.
dashboard.recentClientsEmptyTitle: There are no clients in this branch yet
dashboard.recentClientsEmptyDescription: Create the first client and this block will start feeling like a real operating console.

appointments.title: Appointments
appointments.subtitle: Run the selected branch with day, week or list views without leaving the app shell.
appointments.calendarDescription: FullCalendar consumes /api/barbers and /api/appointments using the active branch and its real time zone.
appointments.noBranchTitle: Select a branch to view the agenda
appointments.noBranchDesc: Appointments are branch-scoped. Once you choose a branch above, the calendar will load in its real time zone.
appointments.noBarbersTitle: There are no barbers in this branch yet
appointments.noBarbersDesc: The agenda needs at least one user with role BARBER and access to this branch before it can show availability.
appointments.overlapError: That barber already has an appointment in this time range.
appointments.emptyPatch: Make at least one change before saving.

fields.startValidation: Enter a valid date and time.
fields.startFormatValidation: Date must use the YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm format.
fields.durationValidation: Duration must be between 5 and 480 minutes.

sheet.createDescription: Create a new appointment using the client, barber and service for the active branch.
sheet.editDescription: Reschedule the appointment, change its status or add operating context.

clientPicker.placeholder: Search client by name, phone or email
clientPicker.hint: Type at least 2 characters to search clients in this branch.
clientPicker.empty: We couldn't find clients for that search.
clientPicker.searchFailed: We couldn't search clients for this appointment.
clientPicker.loadFailed: We couldn't load the client for this appointment.

services.pageDescription: This view operates against /api/services and respects tenant scope.
services.description: Tenant-scoped management with active-first ordering and quick editing in place.
services.listDescription: Services are displayed with active ones first and name ascending.
services.emptyDescription: Create the first one to start operating the tenant.
services.selectActionDescription: You can create a new service or open an existing one to edit it and change its state.
services.name: Name
services.loadOneFailed: We couldn't load the requested service.
services.toggleFailed: We couldn't change the service status.
services.conflict: A service with that name already exists within this tenant.

form.description: Changes go through the internal BFF and keep the token out of the browser.
form.newDefaultActive: New services are created active by default.
form.emptyPatch: Make at least one change before saving.
form.nameValidation: The name must be at least 2 characters long.
form.durationValidation: Duration must be between 5 and 480 minutes.
form.priceValidation: Price must be a valid amount with up to 2 decimals.
form.activeDescription: Keep this service available for bookings and checkout.

clients.pageDescription: This view uses /api/clients and depends on the branch selected in bs_branch_id.
clients.missingBranchTitle: Select a branch above to continue.
clients.missingBranchDescription: Clients are branch-scoped. Until there is an active branch in the cookie, this screen does not make requests.
clients.description: The list uses the branch selected above and supports search and pagination.
clients.listDescription: Search by name, phone or email with branch-scoped pagination.
clients.searchEmptyTitle: We couldn't find clients for that query.
clients.searchEmptyDescription: Try another term or create the first client for this branch.
clients.emptyDescription: Register the first client for the selected branch.
clients.selectActionDescription: You can create a new client, edit an existing one or change its status from the table.
clients.name: Name
clients.loadOneFailed: We couldn't load the requested client.
clients.toggleFailed: We couldn't change the client status.

form.description: This action uses the internal BFF and attaches the branch from the selected cookie.
form.newDefaultActive: New clients are created active by default.
form.emptyPatch: Make at least one change before saving.
form.fullNameValidation: Full name must be at least 2 characters long.
form.emailValidation: Enter a valid email or leave the field empty.
form.activeDescription: Deactivate the client if they should no longer appear in daily operations.

common.restrictedTitle: You don't have access to this module
common.restrictedDescription: Your current role does not expose this space yet. Go back to the dashboard or use an admin role to explore it.

appointments.title: Scheduling is on the way
appointments.subtitle: The shell already has a place for it and the experience is ready to become the daily operating hub.
appointments.description: Bookings, availability and quick reschedules will land here without forcing a chrome redesign later.

bullets.one: A barber timeline with quick edits and a clean day view.
bullets.two: Availability blocks, controlled overbooking and visible confirmations.
bullets.three: Mobile access tuned for front-desk speed.

receipts.title: Cash and receipts with operational focus
receipts.subtitle: This module will complete the loop between service, checkout and daily close by branch.
receipts.description: The visual foundation is already ready for numbering, close-out and cashier states without feeling like a throwaway placeholder.

bullets.one: Branch numbering with a clear next-receipt view.
bullets.two: Daily summaries for reception and managers without duplicated navigation.
bullets.three: Empty and error states already match the rest of the product.

branches.title: Branches and multi-location operations
branches.subtitle: Branch administration will become the bridge between configuration, permissions and local execution.
branches.description: This placeholder already points toward the product direction: less cold backoffice, more actionable multi-branch context.

bullets.one: Policies, schedules and operational settings per branch.
bullets.two: Clear visibility into active, inactive and timezone-aware branches.
bullets.three: Direct integration with the top selector and user access model.

reports.title: Executive reporting with instant read
reports.subtitle: Built for managers who need business clarity without exporting spreadsheets.
reports.description: This module will consolidate KPIs, trends and branch comparisons in a surface that feels like SaaS product, not inherited backoffice.

bullets.one: Branch indicators, catalog performance and weekly trend reading.
bullets.two: Views ready for stakeholders without rebuilding filters each time.
bullets.three: Observability and business metrics connected in the same product layer.

notifications.title: Notifications and reminders hub
notifications.subtitle: The future experience will combine useful signals without turning into noisy inbox theater.
notifications.description: Appointment reminders, checkout alerts and internal nudges will live here so the team can operate with less friction.

bullets.one: Actionable reminders instead of a noisy notification tray.
bullets.two: Clear signals for schedule changes, checkout events and daily follow-up.
bullets.three: Designed to work well on mobile and front-desk flows.

settings.title: Settings with product intent
settings.subtitle: When this module lands, it should feel like a clear tenant control panel, not a junk drawer.
settings.description: The visual base already leaves room for tenant preferences, branding and operational settings that actually matter.

bullets.one: Branding, global schedules and tenant-level preferences.
bullets.two: Experience settings like theme, locale and operational behavior.
bullets.three: A space ready to grow without reworking the shell architecture.
